creator: tvijlbrief@gmail.com
text:
(In reply to Tom Vijlbrief from comment #6)
A few weeks later this problem never occured for me again.

So it only raises its head when portmaster is run for the first time.

I was using a mix of "pkg install" packages and self compiled packages (cd /usr/ports/X/Y; make; make install clean) before I used portmaster for the first time.
